central.name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
central.desc: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three installments to all landholding farmer families.

central.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
central.desc: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support for loss or damage due to natural calamities.

central.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
central.desc: Issuance of soil health cards with nutrient recommendations for improved crop productivity.

central.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
central.desc: Timely and affordable credit for farmers to meet cultivation and allied needs.

central.name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
central.desc: Focused on expanding irrigation coverage and improving water use efficiency across farms.

central.name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture
central.desc: Supporting climate-resilient farming and sustainable agricultural practices.

mh.name: Mahalanobat Utpadan Yojana
mh.desc: Subsidy support for micro-irrigation systems and efficient water use in Maharashtra.

mh.name: Maharashtra Fasal Bima Yojana
mh.desc: State insurance program to protect farmers from crop loss in monsoon and drought years.

mh.name: Mukhya Mantri Kisan Sanman Yojana
mh.desc: Annual direct benefit transfer to eligible farmers for improved income security.

mh.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
mh.desc: Housing support for rural farming families with subsidies for home construction.

mh.name: Maharashtra Organic Farming Mission
mh.desc: Financial and technical support for farmers switching to organic agriculture.

mh.name: Jal Jivan Kranti Mission
mh.desc: Water conservation and rainwater harvesting support for farms in dry regions.

up.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-Kisan)
up.desc: Income support to UP farmers through direct benefit transfer every quarter.

up.name: UP Krishi Credit Card
up.desc: Low-cost loans for small and marginal farmers to buy seeds, fertilizer, and equipment.

up.name: UP Bee-Keeping Subsidy Scheme
up.desc: Grants and training for apiculture to increase farm income through honey production.

up.name: State Fasal Bima Yojana
up.desc: Crop insurance support for farmers facing losses from floods, drought, or pests.

up.name: UP Organic Mission
up.desc: Subsidies to adopt organic farming and access higher-value markets.

up.name: UP Solar Pump Yojana
up.desc: Support for solar irrigation pumps to reduce power costs and improve water use.

pb.name: Mera Pind Smart Pind
pb.desc: Village-level development program supporting farmers with modern infrastructure.

pb.name: Punjab Crop Diversification Programme
pb.desc: Incentives for farmers to grow alternative crops and reduce reliance on paddy.

pb.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
pb.desc: State implementation of central crop insurance for better loss protection.

pb.name: Punjab Kisan Credit Card
pb.desc: Quick credit facility for farmers to meet crop cycle and livestock needs.

pb.name: Punjab Organic Support Scheme
pb.desc: Subsidies for organic inputs and certification for organic farmers.

pb.name: Punjab Farm Mechanization Scheme
pb.desc: Subsidies for tractors, harvesters, and precision farming machines.

gj.name: Gujarat Krishi Mahotsav
gj.desc: Community outreach program offering training and subsidies to farmers.

gj.name: Gujarat Kisan Credit Card
gj.desc: Low-interest agricultural loans to support crop cultivation and farm investment.

gj.name: Gujarat Micro Irrigation Scheme
gj.desc: Subsidies for drip and sprinkler irrigation to conserve water on farms.

gj.name: Gujarat Organic Farming Subsidy
gj.desc: Financial support for farmers adopting organic crop production methods.

gj.name: Gujarat Solar Pump Scheme
gj.desc: Solar pump grants to reduce energy costs and improve irrigation reliability.

gj.name: Gujarat Crop Insurance Support
gj.desc: State-level risk protection for farmers against natural disasters.
